content.en:
"Then use the first method to let a large number of third realms enter the Ice Flame Realm, within ten extradimensional eras, if you can't find the Holy Sea Realm Lord, then destroy the Ice Flame Realm. And in the next ten extradimensional eras, no living beings are allowed to come out, and the third realm they enter is not allowed to come out. "

These Fourth Realms have determined this plan.

Soon, one after another, under the orders of the Fourth Realm, entered the Ice Flame Realm.

Subsequently, these third realms frantically searched for the traces of the Holy Sea Realm Lord, and even some of the Third Realm didn't care about the lives of some weak creatures, and directly attacked one giant city after another, erasing these giant cities, so that although it was very cruel, it was easier to find the Holy Sea Realm Lord, and no matter how powerful the concealment method was, once it encountered such a third realm, it would also be discovered.

......

At this time.

The Holy Sea Realm Lord was already aware of the news that a large number of Third Realms had poured into the Ice Flame Realm, and he even knew that the outside world had been blocked.

"Trouble, the Fourth Realm has locked me in the Ice Flame Realm!"

There was a hint of despair on the face of the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

In this way, it was only a matter of time before he was discovered.

If those Fourth Realms were ruthless enough to destroy the Ice Flame Realm directly, he would be discovered immediately.

"What should I do?"

He was a little flustered for a moment, not knowing what to do.

He kept deducing his own life path, thinking about it, if he wanted to continue to hold the inheritance, then the future would definitely die.

There is only one way to do it now, and that is to hand over the Ka Ye wisdom body inheritance, but it can't appear itself, and another extradimensional realm has to hand over the Ka Ye wisdom body inheritance.

But what extradimensional realm would do this, isn't this tantamount to self-defeating?

Those Fourth Realms will definitely choose to extinguish their mouths, and they will not let go of the extradimensional realm that they have turned in.

As for whether he will continue to search for his traces, he also has no guarantees.

But there's no other way!

......

"The Holy Sea Realm Lord is actually in the Ice Flame Realm!"

Ye Tian also got the news, although the Fourth Realm did not leak the news, they blocked the Ice Flame Realm and sent so many Third Realms into it.

Doesn't this obviously mean that the Holy Sea Realm Lord is in the Ice Flame Realm!

These Fourth Realms did not dare to prevent all the Third Realms from entering, in addition to them, there were other Fourth Realms and related forces, so they would definitely allow the Third Realm to enter, but they would definitely not be allowed to come out until they found the Holy Sea Realm Lord, even if they decided to destroy the Ice Flame Realm afterwards, these external Third Realms would also be checked by them.

"We have to go over immediately, otherwise we will not be allowed to enter the third realm in the future, and then there will be no chance to obtain that innate multi-dimensional Dao body inheritance!"

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled over as fast as he could.

After a while, he came to the Ice Flame Realm.

However, this time he did not copy his body with his real body, otherwise he might be found in the future investigation.

Therefore, he entered the Ice Flame Realm with another copy body of the Third Realm.

After entering the realm of ice and flame, he traveled to one city after another.

There are many extradimensional realms in these cities, and there is a high probability that the Holy Sea Realm Lord is hidden in a certain city, and the probability of hiding outside the city is not very high.

He only stayed in one city for a while before leaving immediately, and as time passed, he passed by one city after another, and each time he used his copying talent to envelop the entire city, looking for the traces of the Holy Sea Realm Lord.

He didn't know if he would be able to find the Holy Sea Realm Lord before the other Third Realms, so he could only try as much as he could.

this day.

When Ye Tian passed by a small city, the copying talent shrouded an area and sensed an existence in the extradimensional realm.

The other party looks very ordinary, just a second realm, but under the shroud of the copying talent, the other party's disguise has no meaning.

"Holy Sea Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

The other party's camouflage methods are really good, if it weren't for the copying talent, even if he stood in front of the Holy Sea Realm Lord, he wouldn't be able to see that he had a trace of disguise.

Ye Tian shuttled to the front of the Holy Sea Realm Lord, and the Holy Sea Realm Lord was very panicked when he saw a third realm coming to him.

Even if this Third Realm is only a mid-stage cultivation of the Third Realm, what if this Third Realm still has a helping hand.

So, he didn't dare to do it.

"I've seen my seniors, but I don't know what happened to my seniors coming to my Yang family?"

The Holy Sea Realm Lord bowed respectfully. []

Ye Tianyi waved his hand, shielding the prying eyes of other extradimensional realms and cultivators in the city, and immediately sat down and said, "Holy Sea Realm Lord, sit down and talk." "

0 begging for flowers

The Holy Sea Realm Lord was stunned, he was actually discovered by a mid-third realm extradimensional realm.

He didn't continue to pretend, the other party shouted his name, this is definitely not a coincidence, and it is useless to deny it.

And the other party did not report it immediately, but directly confessed, obviously there is room for mitigation.

"How did you find me?"

The Holy Sea Realm Lord asked.

"I have my means!" Ye Tian smiled.

"Do you want the Ka Ye Wisdom Body Inheritance?" the Holy Sea Realm Lord asked.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded.

Of course, he still has a plan, that is, to take the life of the Holy Sea Realm Lord, but he can't say that.

The Holy Sea Realm Lord smiled and said, "Which force does Your Excellency come from?"

"There is no power!"

Ye Tian said.

The Holy Sea Realm Lord was silent for a while, and then said, "I can give Your Excellency the inheritance of the wisdom body of the Ka Ye, and I am even willing to give you the original inheritance." The only requirement is that you take the original and hand it over to the Fourth Realm of the outside world, how about it?"

After those Fourth Realms obtained the original, they would know that they could not practice to the first layer, and they would not be able to see the content of the second layer.

When the time comes, those Fourth Realms feel that he only knows the content of the first layer, and maybe they won't continue to hunt him down.

In that case, he would have a chance to live.

Originally, he couldn't find a suitable manpower, the second realm was too weak, and he might be killed if he couldn't get out, and the third realm was qualified to hand over the inheritance originally.

And the third transcendent realm in front of him is a suitable target.

But is he willing to hand over the Kasaba wisdom body inheritance?

"Turn it in?"

Ye Tian was also a little surprised, he thought that the Holy Sea Realm Lord wanted him to accept the inheritance of the wisdom body of the Jiaye and send him away, but he didn't expect that he would give him the inheritance and let him hand it in.

In an instant, he understood the Holy Sea Realm Lord's plan, the other party just wanted to live, but he didn't dare to hand it in person, otherwise he would probably be killed.

I have to say that the Holy Sea Realm Lord's proposal is very tempting.

"Okay, I promise!"

Only by first promising the Holy Sea Realm Lord can he get the inheritance, his strength is not as good as the Holy Sea Realm Lord, so naturally he does not dare to snatch it.

However, the Holy Sea Realm Lord asked Ye Tian to make an oath first, so he was willing to give Ye Tian the inheritance of the original door.
